description: Cross-language lightweight bundle entrypoints that compose State Kernel, Reflection Experience, Mission Parse, Scheduler, Cron System, Triggers, Memory Kernel, and Plugin API Runtime helpers without importing the generated all-in-one clients.
principles: Expose the common external automation workflow as one small SDK bundle: state + reflection + mission parse + scheduler + cron + triggers + memory + plugin runtime.
Keep Agent Kit as a thin composition layer over focused SDK slices, not a new platform abstraction.
Guard TypeScript, Go, Python, and Rust bundle entrypoints and docs against drifting apart.

capabilities.name: state
capabilities.description: Access the lightweight State Kernel client or namespace.

capabilities.name: reflect
capabilities.description: Access the lightweight Reflection Experience client or namespace.

capabilities.description: Access the lightweight Mission Parse client or namespace.

capabilities.name: scheduler
capabilities.description: Access the lightweight Prompt Scheduler client or namespace.

capabilities.name: cron
capabilities.description: Access the lightweight host Cron System client or namespace.

capabilities.name: triggers
capabilities.description: Access the lightweight Triggers v2 automation client or namespace.

capabilities.name: memory
capabilities.description: Access the lightweight host Memory Kernel client or namespace.

capabilities.name: plugin
capabilities.description: Access the lightweight Plugin API Runtime client or namespace.
